title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at South Indian Bank South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at South Indian Bank South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
South Indian Bank South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About South Indian Bank South Asia Partners:
South Indian Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank South Asia Partners!
